abort.single_instance_allowed: Er is slechts 1 Solcast instanctie toegestaan

error.api_looks_like_site: De API-sleutel lijkt op een site-ID
error.limit_one_or_greater: De API-limiet moet één of hoger zijn
error.limit_too_many: Er zijn meer API-limietwaarden ingevoerd dan sleutels

data.api_quota: API-limiet (optioneel zijn meerdere waarden gescheiden door een komma voor elke sleutel)

reconfigure_confirm.description:
Solcast accountgegevens

(Als u geen automatische updates gebruikt, is automatisering vereist - zie de integratiedocumentatie)

data.api_quota: API-limiet (optioneel zijn meerdere waarden gescheiden door een komma voor elke sleutel)

user.description:
Solcast accountgegevens

(Als u geen automatische updates gebruikt, is automatisering vereist - zie de integratiedocumentatie)

actuals_not_enabled.message: Geschatte werkelijke acquisitie is niet ingeschakeld.

auto_use_force.message: Automatische update is ingeschakeld, negeer service-evenement voor prognose-update, gebruik in plaats daarvan Force Update.

auto_use_normal.message: Automatische update is niet ingeschakeld, negeer service-gebeurtenis voor gedwongen update van prognose, gebruik in plaats daarvan Update.

build_failed_actuals.message: Kan geschatte actuele gegevens niet samenstellen (corrupte config/solcast-actuals.json?)

damp_auto_enabled.message: Automatische demping is ingeschakeld, handmatige dempingsfactoren zijn niet ingesteld.

damp_count_not_correct.message: Er zijn geen 24 of 48 door komma's gescheiden getallen tussen 0.0 en 1.0.

damp_error_parsing.message: Fout bij het ontleden van door komma's gescheiden getallen voor dempingsfactor.

damp_no_all_24.message: Het specificeren van een locatie ‘all’ is niet toegestaan met 24 factoren. Verwijder de locatie uit het verzoek.

damp_no_factors.message: Geen dempingsfactoren opgegeven, moet een door komma's gescheiden lijst van getallen tussen 0,0 en 1,0 zijn.

damp_outside_range.message: Dempingsfactorwaarde aanwezig die niet tussen 0.0 en 1.0 ligt.

damp_use_all.message: Site-demping is niet ingesteld voor {site}, ‘all’ is de enige beschikbare siteparameter voor de serviceaanroep.

hard_not_positive_number.message: Harde grenswaarde is geen positief getal.

hard_too_many.message: Er zijn meer harde grenswaarden gespecificeerd dan er API-sleutels zijn.

init_cannot_get_sites.message: De gegevens van de sites konden niet worden opgehaald.

init_cannot_get_sites_cache_invalid.message: De gegevens van de sites konden niet worden opgehaald en de cache is ongeldig.

init_corrupt.message: De cachegegevens in {file} zijn beschadigd. Wij raden u aan deze te verwijderen of te herstellen.

init_incompatible.message: De gegevens in de cache in `{file}` zijn niet compatibel. Wij raden aan deze te verwijderen.

init_unknown.message: Uitzondering bij het laden van sitegegevens.

init_usage_corrupt.message: Gebruiksgegevens zijn beschadigd, controleer of verwijder `config/solcast_solar/solcast-usage.json`.

integration_not_loaded.message: Integratie niet geladen, geen actie uitgevoerd.

integration_prior_crash.message: Integratie kon eerder niet worden geladen, we proberen straks opnieuw.

invalid_custom_hours_format.message: De waarde voor het aantal uren moet een geheel getal zijn.

invalid_custom_hours_range.message: De waarde voor het aantal uren moet tussen 1 en 144 liggen.

advanced_deprecated.description: Advanced configuration option(s) `{option}` changed to `{new_option}`. Please update your advanced configuration options to use the new option name.{stops_working}
advanced_deprecated.title: Advanced option deprecated

advanced_problem.title: Advanced option problem

api_unavailable.description:
The Solcast API has reported `429 / Try again later` status repeatedly during an update.

* Do not attempt to fix this situation.
* Do not change your API key.
* Avoid restarting the integration
* This is not an integration issue and will resolve itself. Change nothing.

(To suppress this issue, create an advanced configuration option api_raise_issue and set it to false.)
api_unavailable.title: Solcast API temporarily unavailable

corrupt_file.description: The cached data file(s) `{files}` is corrupted. The integration will attempt to recover by deleting the file(s) and re-fetching data from Solcast. Expect increased API usage and potential API failures, and loss of forecast history due to this situation. Possibly recover the files from backup, but still expect API call failures.
corrupt_file.title: Corrupted cached data

records_missing.description: Future forecast data is missing, which is unexpected because auto-update is enabled. Investigate the cause by examining the Home Assistant log. Read the troubleshooting FAQ before raising an integration issue.
records_missing.title: Future forecasts missing

offer_auto.description: A forecast update automation has not been running. Would you like to enable auto-update? (Learn more: {learn_more})
offer_auto.title: Future forecasts missing

records_missing_initial.description: Forecast and/or estimated actual data is missing, likely because the initial forecast update did not occur. This is likely because the API call limit has been reached. You _will_ have sensor entity issues, and the Energy dashboard will likely have missing data. This will resolve itself.
records_missing_initial.title: Forecasts missing

records_missing_unfixable.description: Future forecast data is missing, which is unexpected. Check the logs.
records_missing_unfixable.title: Future forecasts missing

unusual_azimuth_northern.description: The azimuth for site {site} is unusual for the latitude of this northern hemisphere rooftop. Should this be {proposal} instead of {extant}? (Ignore the issue if the site is facing towards North.)
unusual_azimuth_northern.title: Unusual azimuth

unusual_azimuth_southern.description: The azimuth for site {site} is unusual for the latitude of this southern hemisphere rooftop. Should this be {proposal} instead of {extant}? (Ignore the issue if the site is facing towards South.)
unusual_azimuth_southern.title: Unusual azimuth

error.actuals_not_enabled: Estimated actuals acquisition is not enabled
error.actuals_without_get: Estimated actuals cannot be used without getting them
error.api_looks_like_site: API key looks like a site ID
error.dampen_without_actuals: Estimated actuals must be selected to use auto-dampening
error.dampen_without_generation: At least one PV generation sensor must be specified to use auto-dampening (energy or power)
error.export_multiple_entities: Site export entity must be a single entity, not multiple entities
error.export_no_entity: Site export entity must be specified if site export limit is set
error.generation_mixed_types: PV generation entities must all be the same type (all energy or all power, not a mix)
error.hard_not_number: Hard limit is not a positive number
error.hard_too_many: There are more hard limits entered than keys
error.limit_not_number: API limit is not a number
error.limit_one_or_greater: API limit must be one or greater
error.limit_too_many: There are more API limit counts entered than keys

data.api_quota: API limit (optionally comma separate multiple values for each key)
data.attr_brk_detailed: Enable site breakdown for half-hourly/hourly detail attributes (these will not be saved to database state attributes)
data.auto_dampen: Auto-dampen (requires estimated actuals and PV generation entity, see integration documentation)
data.auto_update: Auto-update (if no auto-update then an automation must be used instead)
data.config_damp: Modify the hourly dampening factors (after clicking submit)
data.customhoursensor: Custom next X hours sensor (min=1, max=144)
data.exclude_sites: Site(s) to exclude from the Energy dashboard and sensor totals
data.generation_entities: PV generation entity/entities for automated dampening (energy: Wh/kWh/MWh total increasing, or power: W/kW/MW instantaneous)
data.get_actuals: Estimated actuals updated at midnight (see integration documentation, uses one API call per site per day, so a reduced API limit is needed with this option enabled)
data.hard_limit_api: Inverter hard limit in kW (see integration documentation, comma separate multiple values for each key)
data.key_estimate: Preferred forecast likelihood to use for sensors
data.site_damp: Granular dampening is set: Clear to revert to overall hourly dampening
data.site_export_entity: Optional site export entity for automated dampening (Wh/kWh/MWh, total increasing)
data.site_export_limit: Site export limit if site export is specified (kW)
data.use_actuals: Forecast history to show on the Energy dashboard

options.1: Automatic update of forecasts from sunrise to sunset
options.2: Automatic update of forecasts over 24 hours

options.estimate10: 10th percentile expected generation (lower end of possible outcomes, estimate10)
options.estimate90: 90th percentile expected generation (upper end of possible outcomes, estimate90)

clear_all_solcast_data.description: Deletes the solcast.json file to remove all current solcast site data.
clear_all_solcast_data.name: Clear all saved Solcast data

force_update_estimates.description: Force fetches the latest estimated actual data from Solcast.
force_update_estimates.name: Force Update Estimated Actuals

force_update_forecasts.description: Force fetches the latest forecasts data from Solcast.
force_update_forecasts.name: Force Update

site.description: Optional site to get dampening. (Note: Will not work if granular dampening is not enabled.)
site.name: Site ID

query_estimate_data.description: Return a data set for a given query.

end_date_time.description: Query estimated actual data events up to date time.
end_date_time.name: End date time

start_date_time.description: Query estimated actual data events from date time.
start_date_time.name: Start date time

query_estimate_data.name: Query estimated actual data

query_forecast_data.description: Return a data set for a given query.

end_date_time.description: Query forecast data events up to date time.
end_date_time.name: End date time

site.description: Optional site to retrieve one site forecast
site.name: Site ID

start_date_time.description: Query forecast data events from date time.
start_date_time.name: Start date time

undampened.description: Optional boolean to retrieve un-dampened forecast
undampened.name: Undampened

query_forecast_data.name: Query forecast data

set_custom_hours.description: Set the custom X hours sensor number of hours.
set_custom_hours.name: Set custom hours sensor

damp_factor.description: String of dampening factor values comma separated (24 or 48 values).
damp_factor.name: Dampening string

site.description: Optional site to set per-site dampening. (Note: Omitting site clears per-site dampening unless 48 values.)
site.name: Site ID

set_hard_limit.description: Prevent forecast values being higher than the inverter can produce.

hard_limit.description: Set the max value in Watts that the inverter can produce.
hard_limit.name: Limit value in Watts

set_hard_limit.name: Set inverter forecast hard limit

update_forecasts.description: Fetches the latest forecasts data from Solcast.
update_forecasts.name: Update
